zh.lifeSummary: 當Stefan Torun於1359年4月1日出生在波蘭庫亞福斯可-波莫斯吉度盧n時，他的父親Nicolaus Torun32歲，母親Lady Christine Prussian24歲。他於1380年與Gilda Slavic在波蘭庫亞福斯可-波莫斯吉度盧n結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年7月15日在海因里希_奧斯普斯可萊斯 奧斯特盧德坦能格享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stefan Torun于1359年4月1日出生在波兰庫亞福斯可-波莫斯吉度盧n时，他的父亲Nicolaus Torun32岁，母亲Lady Christine Prussian24岁。他于1380年与Gilda Slavic在波兰庫亞福斯可-波莫斯吉度盧n结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年7月15日在海因里希_奧斯普斯可萊斯 奧斯特盧德坦能格享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Torun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hanoch, Moshe, Shira.
Dutch (also Van Toren): topographic name from Middle Dutch tor(r)en ‘tower’ (from Latin turris), or a habitational name from any of many places called with this word.
Swedish (Torén): ornamental name from the personal name Tor(e) (see Thor ) + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Erland, Eyvind, Nels.  Southeast Asian Chor, Tong, Chia, Chu, Kong, Seng, Tou, Chee, Ching, Chou, Chue, Eng, Thai, Moua, Neng, Pao, Yeng, Yer, Blong, Chong, Choua, Houa, Shoua, Soua.
Swedish and Danish: from a short form of any of various Scandinavian personal names containing the first element Thor (Old Norse Thórr), the name of the god of thunder in Scandinavian mythology.
English: from the Anglo-Scandinavian name Thōr, Thūr, probably short forms of Old Norse compound names in Thór-, Thúr- (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Stefan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: , German, Dutch, Polish, and South Slavic form of   Stephen  , now also quite commonly used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Staffan
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

en.lifeSummary: When Stefan Torun was born on 1 April 1359, in Toruń, Kuyavia-Pomerania, Poland, his father, Nicolaus Torun, was 32 and his mother, Lady Christine Prussian, was 24. He married Gilda Slavic in 1380, in Toruń, Kuyavia-Pomerania, Poland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 July 1410, in Tannenberg, Osterode, East Prussia, Prussia, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stefan Torun est né le 1 avril 1359, à Toruń, kujawsko-pomorskie, Pologne, son père, Nicolaus Torun, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Christine Prussian, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Gilda Slavic en 1380, à Toruń, kujawsko-pomorskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1410, à Tannenberg, Kreis Osterode, Prusse Orientale, Prusse, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stefan Torun am 1. April 1359 in Thorn, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolaus Torun 32 und seine Mutter Lady Christine Prussian 24. Er hat 1380 in Thorn, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polen Gilda Slavic geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1410 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Tannenberg, Kreis Osterode, Ostpreußen, Preußen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stefan Torun è nato il il 1 aprile 1359 nel Toruń, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Nicolaus Torun, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christine Prussian, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Gilda Slavic nel 1380, nel Toruń, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 luglio 1410, nel Tannenberg, Kreis Osterode, Ostpreußen, Preußen, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stefan Torunが1359年4月1日にポーランドクジャウスコ-プオモースキトルnで生まれた時，父Nicolaus Torunは32歳，母Lady Christine Prussianは24歳であった。1380年にポーランドクジャウスコ-プオモースキトルnでGilda Slavicと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年7月15日にプレウssンオストプレウssンクレイス オステロドタネンバーグで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stefan Torun(이)가 1359년 4월 1일 폴란드 쿠자w스코-폼르스키 토루n에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolaus Torun(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christine Prussian(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1380년 폴란드 쿠자w스코-폼르스키 토루n에서 Gilda Slavic(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 7월 15일 프레우ss 오스트프레우ss 크레이스 오스터드 탠버그에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 April 1359–15 July 1410: 1 de abril de 1359–15 de julho de 1410
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stefan Torun nasceu em 1 de abril de 1359, em Toruń, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polônia, seu pai, Nicolaus Torun, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christine Prussian, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Gilda Slavic em 1380, em Toruń, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1410, em Tannenberg, Kreis Osterode, Ostpreußen, Preußen, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stefan Torun родился 1 апреля 1359 г. в местности торуn, куджавско-поморски, Польша, его отцу по имени Nicolaus Torun было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Christine Prussian, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Gilda Slavic в 1380 г. в местности торуn, куджавско-поморски, Польша. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 июля 1410 г. в местности танненбирг, крис остирод, остпреуssен, Пруссия в возрасте 51 год.

es.1 April 1359–15 July 1410: 1 de abril de 1359–15 de julio de 1410
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stefan Torun nació el 1 de abril de 1359, en Toruń, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polonia, su papá, Nicolaus Torun, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Christine Prussian, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gilda Slavic en 1380, en Toruń, kujawsko-pomorskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de julio de 1410, en Tannenberg, Kreis Osterode, Ostpreußen, Preußen, a la edad de 51 años.
